proyecto.title: Blue Lagoon
proyecto.body1: A unique residential experience where nature, design, and wellness come together to create an incomparable lifestyle.
proyecto.body2: Located in Pedro Juan Caballero, in a strategic position on the border with Brazil, Blue Lagoon is a premium residential development conceived for those seeking exclusivity, privacy, and an investment with high appreciation potential. With 86 hectares of planned development and 493 lots, the project combines an impressive 4-hectare crystal-clear lagoon, white sand beaches, first-class infrastructure, and a selection of amenities designed to elevate every moment.

laguna.title: THE LAGOON
laguna.body: The heart of Blue Lagoon. A turquoise-water lagoon surrounded by white sand, ideal for swimming, water sports, or simply relaxing under the sun.

lifestyle.title: LIFESTYLE
lifestyle.body: Blue Lagoon offers a lifestyle where every day feels like a vacation. Club House, pool, family solarium, and spaces designed for wellness and community living.

deportes.title: SPORTS
deportes.body: A complete sports area with tennis, paddle, football, and basketball courts. Spaces designed for an active and healthy life.

brochure.title: BROCHURE
brochure.body: Discover all the details of Blue Lagoon. Download the complete brochure with information on lots, amenities, and master plan.

ubicacion.title: LOCATION
ubicacion.desc: On the border with Brazil, a strategic location with high appreciation potential.

noticias.title: NEWS
noticias.notFoundDesc: The article you're looking for doesn't exist or was removed.
